title: Rich Crispy Turkish Tomato Flatbread
description: A delicious and crispy Turkish flatbread filled with rich tomato puree, perfect for a brunch mood. This low-fat-friendly dish is made with wholesome ingredients and is easy to prepare.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Gradually add warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a thin circle, about 1/4 inch thick.
Spread the tomato puree over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Drizzle olive oil over the tomato puree and sprinkle with sliced red onion and chopped parsley.
Fold the edges of the dough over the filling to form a crust, and brush with a little water.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until it is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
